moments.title: The Open Championship Tees Off
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship begins tomorrow at Royal Birkdale Golf Club in Southport, England, running until Sunday, July 19th.

angles.name: Main Event
angles.copy: Golf's oldest major is back! The Open Championship kicks off tomorrow at Royal Birkdale. Who are you backing for the Claret Jug this year?

angles.name: UK Host
angles.copy: Royal Birkdale is ready! The 154th Open Championship brings the world's best golfers to Southport for four days of intense competition, starting Thursday.

moments.title: Tour de France Continues
moments.blurb: The 113th edition of the Tour de France is well underway, having started in Barcelona on July 4th and continuing until July 26th.

angles.name: Mid-Race Update
angles.copy: The peloton is battling through Stage 11 today! Who's impressing you most in the Tour de France as we head towards the final week?

angles.name: Cycling Buzz
angles.copy: Three weeks of gruelling climbs and sprint finishes! The Tour de France is delivering all the drama. Catch up on the latest from the iconic race.

moments.title: Latitude Festival Approaches
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival celebrates its 20th anniversary at Henham Park, Suffolk, from July 23rd to 26th, featuring headliners David Byrne, Teddy Swims, and Lewis Capaldi.

angles.name: Anniversary Edition
angles.copy: Twenty years of Latitude! Henham Park is gearing up for David Byrne, Teddy Swims, and Lewis Capaldi next week. Who are you excited to see?

angles.name: Festival Countdown
angles.copy: It's almost time for Latitude Festival! From music to comedy, art to literature, it all kicks off next Thursday in Suffolk.

moments.title: Wales Airshow Returns to Swansea
moments.blurb: The Wales Airshow will take to the skies over Swansea Bay on July 25th and 26th, promising spectacular aerial displays and ground entertainment, including an 'Afterburn' evening show.

angles.name: Swansea Skies
angles.copy: Get ready for lift-off! The Wales Airshow returns to Swansea Bay next weekend, July 25-26. Expect breathtaking displays and a brand new 'Afterburn' evening show!

angles.name: Family Fun
angles.copy: Planes, stunts, and fireworks! The Wales Airshow is back in Swansea Bay. Two days of free, family-friendly fun in the natural amphitheatre.

moments.title: Richard Ashcroft at Cardiff Castle
moments.blurb: Richard Ashcroft, former frontman of The Verve, performs at Cardiff Castle tomorrow, July 16th.

angles.name: Castle Rock
angles.copy: Richard Ashcroft brings his iconic sound to Cardiff Castle tomorrow! Who's heading to see the legend live?

angles.name: Verging on Epic
angles.copy: From The Verve to solo brilliance, Richard Ashcroft takes the stage at Cardiff Castle. Don't miss this one!

moments.title: Sammy Virji at Cardiff Castle
moments.blurb: DJ Sammy Virji is set to play Cardiff Castle on Saturday, July 18th, as part of the Shangri-La event.

angles.name: Dance at the Castle
angles.copy: Sammy Virji is taking over Cardiff Castle this Saturday for Shangri-La! Get ready for a night of huge beats.

angles.name: Weekend Warm-up
angles.copy: Cardiff Castle is transforming into a dance haven this weekend with Sammy Virji. Who's got their tickets?

moments.title: England vs India ODI in Cardiff
moments.blurb: England's men's cricket team will face India in an One Day International match at Sophia Gardens in Cardiff tomorrow, July 16th.

angles.name: Cricket Clash
angles.copy: Big game in Cardiff tomorrow! England takes on India in a One Day International. Who are you rooting for?

angles.name: Home Advantage?
angles.copy: Sophia Gardens is set for a cracking ODI as England and India go head-to-head. Will the Welsh crowd roar England to victory?

moments.title: Exeter Cider Fest
moments.blurb: The Secret Garden's 5th annual Cider Fest returns to Exeter on Saturday 18th and Sunday 19th July, featuring live music, street food, and a celebration of cider.

angles.name: Cider & Sunshine
angles.copy: Cheers to the weekend! Exeter's Cider Fest is back this Saturday and Sunday at The Secret Garden. Get ready for live music, food, and plenty of cider!

angles.name: Local Brews
angles.copy: Support local and enjoy the best of the West Country! Exeter Cider Fest is the perfect way to spend your weekend. What's your favourite cider?

moments.title: Jazz on the Quay in Exeter
moments.blurb: Jazz on the Quay brings free live jazz to Exeter's quayside every Sunday during the summer, with the next event scheduled for July 19th.

angles.name: Sunday Vibes
angles.copy: Smooth sounds by the water! Jazz on the Quay is back this Sunday in Exeter. Grab a spot and enjoy some free live music.

angles.name: Summer Soundtrack
angles.copy: Make your Sunday special with Jazz on the Quay! The perfect chilled-out atmosphere on Exeter's beautiful quayside.

moments.title: Linda Ronstadt's 80th Birthday
moments.blurb: Today, July 15th, marks the 80th birthday of legendary singer Linda Ronstadt, known for her versatile voice across rock, country, and pop.

angles.name: Celebrating a Legend
angles.copy: Happy 80th birthday to the incredible Linda Ronstadt! Her voice defined an era and continues to captivate. What's your favourite track?

angles.name: Voice of a Generation
angles.copy: From rock to country, Linda Ronstadt mastered it all. Celebrating the 80th birthday of a true musical icon today!

moments.title: Stewart Copeland's 74th Birthday
moments.blurb: Tomorrow, July 16th, marks the 74th birthday of Stewart Copeland, the influential drummer and co-founder of The Police.

angles.name: Rhythmic Genius
angles.copy: Tomorrow we celebrate the 74th birthday of drumming powerhouse, Stewart Copeland! What's your favourite Police track featuring his iconic beats?

angles.name: The Police Legend
angles.copy: Happy birthday for tomorrow to the one and only Stewart Copeland! Co-founder and rhythmic backbone of The Police.

moments.title: Luke Bryan's 50th Birthday
moments.blurb: Country superstar Luke Bryan turns 50 on Friday, July 17th.

angles.name: Country Milestone
angles.copy: Happy 50th birthday to Luke Bryan on Friday! Half a century of country hits and stadium-filling anthems. What's your go-to Luke Bryan song?

angles.name: Celebrating Luke
angles.copy: Raising a glass to Luke Bryan, turning 50 this Friday! Send us your birthday wishes for the country music icon.

moments.title: M.I.A.'s 51st Birthday
moments.blurb: Rapper, singer, and songwriter M.I.A. celebrates her 51st birthday on Saturday, July 18th.

angles.name: Genre-Bending Icon
angles.copy: Happy 51st birthday to the groundbreaking M.I.A. this Saturday! From 'Paper Planes' to 'Bad Girls,' her impact is undeniable.

angles.name: Birthday Shout-out
angles.copy: Celebrating M.I.A.'s 51st birthday this weekend! What's your favourite track from the visionary artist?

moments.title: Brian May's 79th Birthday
moments.blurb: Queen guitarist and rock legend Brian May turns 79 on Sunday, July 19th.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the legendary Brian May this Sunday! His riffs and solos are simply iconic. What's your favourite Queen guitar moment?

angles.name: Rock Royalty
angles.copy: Celebrating the incomparable Brian May this weekend! The Queen guitarist and astrophysicist turns 79. Send him your birthday love!

moments.title: Carlos Santana's 79th Birthday
moments.blurb: Legendary guitarist Carlos Santana celebrates his 79th birthday on Monday, July 20th.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the one and only Carlos Santana on Monday! His guitar work is instantly recognisable. What's your favourite Santana track?

angles.name: Timeless Sound
angles.copy: Celebrating the enduring magic of Carlos Santana! The guitar maestro turns 79 next week. Which song makes you hit repeat?

moments.title: Cat Stevens / Yusuf Islam's 78th Birthday
moments.blurb: Singer-songwriter Cat Stevens, also known as Yusuf Islam, turns 78 on Tuesday, July 21st.

angles.name: Folk Icon
angles.copy: Happy 78th birthday to the brilliant Cat Stevens / Yusuf Islam next Tuesday! His timeless songs continue to resonate. What's your favourite?

angles.name: Melody Maker
angles.copy: Celebrating the poetic genius of Cat Stevens! The singer-songwriter turns 78 next week. Which of his classic tracks is always on your playlist?

moments.title: Don Henley's 79th Birthday
moments.blurb: Don Henley, co-founder, drummer, and vocalist of the Eagles, celebrates his 79th birthday on Tuesday, July 21st.

angles.name: Eagles Legend
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to Don Henley next Tuesday! The voice behind so many Eagles classics. What's your favourite Don Henley moment?

angles.name: Rock Royalty
angles.copy: Celebrating the drumming and vocal talent of Don Henley! The Eagles co-founder turns 79 next week. Which of his hits is your favourite?

moments.title: Donny Osmond's 69th Birthday
moments.blurb: American singer, dancer, and actor Donny Osmond turns 69 on Wednesday, July 22nd.

angles.name: Enduring Star
angles.copy: Happy 69th birthday to the one and only Donny Osmond next Wednesday! From teen idol to Vegas icon, he's done it all. What's your favourite Donny track?

angles.name: Pop Icon
angles.copy: Celebrating Donny Osmond's 69th birthday next week! Still bringing the entertainment after decades in the spotlight.

moments.title: Slash's 61st Birthday
moments.blurb: Guns N' Roses lead guitarist Slash celebrates his 61st birthday on Thursday, July 23rd.

angles.name: Guitar Hero
angles.copy: Happy 61st birthday to the legendary Slash next Thursday! Those iconic riffs are unmistakable. What's your favourite Slash guitar solo?

angles.name: Top Hat & Guitar
angles.copy: Celebrating the one and only Slash! The Guns N' Roses legend turns 61 next week. Rock on!

moments.title: Jennifer Lopez's 57th Birthday
moments.blurb: Global superstar Jennifer Lopez celebrates her 57th birthday on Friday, July 24th.

angles.name: JLo Turns 57
angles.copy: Happy 57th birthday to the incredible Jennifer Lopez next Friday! Still dominating music, film, and fashion. What's your favourite JLo anthem?

angles.name: Superstar Birthday
angles.copy: Celebrating the one and only JLo! Jennifer Lopez turns 57 next week. Which of her hits gets you on the dance floor?
